description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular design with a predominantly beige and olive green color scheme, accented by orange and black details. The body is constructed from what appears to be a composite material, with a large, rectangular stock at the rear and a cylindrical barrel at the front. The rifle includes a prominent sighting system mounted on top, and a visible magazine or power cell attached to the underside near the stock. The surface is matte with some visible wear, including tally marks and warning labels, suggesting frequent use. The muzzle is reinforced and slightly flared, while the grip and trigger assembly are integrated into the lower section of the body. Overall, the rifle has a futuristic, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A futuristic, angular rifle with a beige and olive green body, orange accents, and a prominent sight and magazine. The design is robust and utilitarian, with visible wear and warning labels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical barrel opening, sight, and reinforced muzzle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, the sight, magazine, grip, and tally marks on the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rectangular stock and the back of the sight system.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, grip, and additional warning labels.
